requirement_topic.en: Market Access — CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity, import inspection, and in-country importer
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——CACEA/贸易部合格评定、进口检验与在地进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——CACEA/貿易部合格評定、進口檢驗與在地進口商

summary.en: Ethiopia controls market access through conformity assessment and import inspection administered by CACEA (the national conformity-assessment / inspection function) under the Ministry of Trade, rather than through a CE-style self-declaration. Regulated products require an in-country importer of record who lodges import documentation, arranges inspection, and is the legal interface with Ethiopian authorities; a foreign manufacturer generally cannot place goods on the market without a local importer. Practical entry also depends on logistics: Ethiopia is landlocked, so most sea cargo arrives via the Port of Djibouti and moves overland under the Djibouti corridor, which affects lead time, transit documentation, and where inspection occurs.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚通过贸易部下属CACEA（国家合格评定/检验职能）管理的合格评定与进口检验来控制市场准入，而非CE式自我声明。受监管产品须有在地进口责任人，负责报送进口文件、安排检验，并作为与埃塞俄比亚主管机关的法律对接方；外国制造商通常不能在没有本地进口商的情况下投放货物。实际进入还取决于物流：埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，海运货物多经吉布提港抵达，并沿吉布提走廊陆运，这会影响交付周期、转运单证及检验发生地点。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞透過貿易部下屬CACEA（國家合格評定/檢驗職能）管理的合格評定與進口檢驗來控制市場准入，而非CE式自我聲明。受監管產品須有在地進口責任人，負責報送進口文件、安排檢驗，並作為與衣索比亞主管機關的法律對接方；外國製造商通常不能在沒有本地進口商的情況下投放貨物。實際進入還取決於物流：衣索比亞為內陸國，海運貨物多經吉布提港抵達，並沿吉布提走廊陸運，這會影響交付週期、轉運單證及檢驗發生地點。

standards_or_laws: CACEA / Ministry of Trade — conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products
In-country importer of record — required to lodge import documentation and interface with authorities
Logistics: landlocked Ethiopia served primarily via the Port of Djibouti and the Djibouti corridor

summary.en: China's domestic market-access scheme for many finished electronic and battery products is CCC (China Compulsory Certification) plus customs and SAMR oversight; exporters are accustomed to factory inspection and certificate-based clearance. None of these Chinese mechanisms grant Ethiopian market access: CCC is not recognised by CACEA, and a Chinese export licence does not replace an Ethiopian importer of record. The Chinese-side baseline is therefore export documentation and product standards, while the Ethiopian-side requirement is a local importer plus CACEA import inspection.
summary.zh: 中国对许多电子及电池终端产品的国内市场准入制度为CCC（中国强制性产品认证）加上海关与SAMR监管；出口商熟悉工厂检查和基于证书的放行。这些中国机制均不授予埃塞俄比亚市场准入：CCC不被CACEA承认，中国出口许可也不能替代埃塞俄比亚进口责任人。因此中国侧基线为出口单证与产品标准，埃塞俄比亚侧要求为本地进口商加CACEA进口检验。
summary.zht: 中國對許多電子及電池終端產品的國內市場准入制度為CCC（中國強制性產品認證）加上海關與SAMR監管；出口商熟悉工廠檢查和基於證書的放行。這些中國機制均不授予衣索比亞市場准入：CCC不被CACEA承認，中國出口許可也不能替代衣索比亞進口責任人。因此中國側基線為出口單證與產品標準，衣索比亞側要求為本地進口商加CACEA進口檢驗。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — China-domestic market-access scheme (not recognised in Ethiopia)
China Customs / SAMR export and product-standard oversight

gap.en: The core gap is structural: Ethiopia gates access through a local importer and CACEA import inspection, not through a manufacturer self-declaration. Exporters must (1) appoint an in-country importer of record; (2) provide test evidence to the adopted ES/IEC standards (and ECA approval for wireless) for the importer to lodge; (3) plan logistics around the landlocked Djibouti corridor, since transit time and the point of inspection differ from a direct-port market. China CCC and export licences do not substitute for any of these. There is no EU-style Authorised Representative concept; the importer of record performs the equivalent legal-interface role.
gap.zh: 核心差距是结构性的：埃塞俄比亚通过本地进口商和CACEA进口检验把关，而非制造商自我声明。出口商须（1）指定在地进口责任人；（2）提供符合所采纳ES/IEC标准的测试证据（无线产品另加ECA许可）供进口商报送；（3）围绕内陆的吉布提走廊规划物流，因转运时间与检验地点不同于直达港口市场。中国CCC和出口许可不能替代上述任何一项。不存在欧盟式授权代表概念；进口责任人承担相当的法律对接角色。
gap.zht: 核心差距是結構性的：衣索比亞透過本地進口商和CACEA進口檢驗把關，而非製造商自我聲明。出口商須（1）指定在地進口責任人；（2）提供符合所採納ES/IEC標準的測試證據（無線產品另加ECA許可）供進口商報送；（3）圍繞內陸的吉布提走廊規劃物流，因轉運時間與檢驗地點不同於直達港口市場。中國CCC和出口許可不能替代上述任何一項。不存在歐盟式授權代表概念；進口責任人承擔相當的法律對接角色。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection apply on entry, and an in-country importer of record is required to clear goods
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC required for in-scope finished products sold in China; not recognised for Ethiopian market access

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration, Ethiopia (CACEA conformity / import inspection)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopian market access runs through an in-country importer of record plus CACEA / Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection, not a CE-style self-declaration. China CCC and export licences do not grant access. Exporters should appoint a local importer, supply ES/IEC test evidence (and ECA approval for wireless) for lodging, and plan logistics around the landlocked Djibouti corridor, where transit time and inspection points differ from a direct-port market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚市场准入须经在地进口责任人，并由CACEA/贸易部进行合格评定与进口检验，而非CE式自我声明。中国CCC和出口许可不授予准入。出口商应指定本地进口商，提供ES/IEC测试证据（无线产品另加ECA许可）供报送，并围绕内陆吉布提走廊规划物流，因其转运时间与检验节点不同于直达港口市场。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞市場准入須經在地進口責任人，並由CACEA/貿易部進行合格評定與進口檢驗，而非CE式自我聲明。中國CCC和出口許可不授予准入。出口商應指定本地進口商，提供ES/IEC測試證據（無線產品另加ECA許可）供報送，並圍繞內陸吉布提走廊規劃物流，因其轉運時間與檢驗節點不同於直達港口市場。
